# Subhajit Mahata

> Subhajit Mahata (also known as **Subha**) is an **AI developer, prompt engineer, Blender 3D artist and n8n automation expert** who builds animation-driven web experiences and AI applications. Portfolio: https://subhajitmahata.vercel.app/

## About

- **Name:** Subhajit Mahata (Subha)
- **Role:** AI Developer · Prompt Engineer · Animation & Blender 3D Artist · n8n Automation Engineer · Designer
- **Tagline:** "Friendly neighbourhood AI developer — with great prompts comes great outputs."
- **Skills:** Prompt engineering, AI app development, generative AI, animation, Blender 3D, n8n workflow automation, Three.js, creative front-end / web development, motion design.

## Projects (Missions)

- [Clawed](https://clawed-five.vercel.app/): A pixel-crab desktop pet built in Python with AI that lives on your screen. Tags: Python, AI, desktop pet.
- [Cutty City](https://city-bice-sigma.vercel.app/): An open-world 3D city running in the browser. Tags: Three.js, Rapier physics.
- [Neon Room](https://neon-room-walkthrough.vercel.app/): A room modelled in Blender, made walkable on the web. Tags: Blender, 3D walkthrough.
